states.name: Cinderwolf
states.title: Cinderwolf
states.description: This hot-blooded wolf is infused with the elemental essence of fire. Farmers experimented with domesticating them, but this resulted in torched fields and livestock.

states.name: Blazewolf
states.title: Blazewolf
states.description: Packs of these wolves have been known to terrorize camping travelers. They don't steal food—they simply sleep in their campfires.
